name: GEMV (INT16 → INT32)
signature: void matvec_vectorized_i16_i32(int16_t* a_in, int16_t* b_in, int32_t* c_out);
description: General matrix-vector multiply (GEMV). INT16 inputs, INT32 accumulation. Tile sizes controlled by DIM_M/DIM_K defines (default 32x32). Matrix A must be in 32-bit word-transposed layout.
